prompt: Generate a synthetic image for facial estimation, using the reference's clear, bright lighting and close-up side profile view. Focus on sharp facial features and a neutral or slightly expressive face suitable for analysis.
prompt_refined: Generate a synthetic image of a human face for facial estimation. Emulate the clear, bright, even studio lighting and plain white background from image 1. The image should depict a close-up, three-quarter side profile view of the face, mirroring the angle in image 1. Focus on sharp, well-defined facial features and a neutral or subtly expressive facial expression suitable for analytical purposes, without the hand and cream present in image 1.
objects: three-quarter side profile view of the face
neutral or subtly expressive facial expression
